title: Charges dropped against Georgia teens whose teacher died during toilet paper prank
summary_full: The teacher's family had asked for charges, including one of homicide, to be dropped "to prevent a separate tragedy from occuring" over the prank turned fatal.
summary_public: The teacher's family had asked for charges, including one of homicide, to be dropped "to prevent a separate tragedy from occuring" over the prank turned fatal.

GE.label: neutral
GE.evidence: Charges dropped against Georgia teens whose teacher died
